ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "tcd_id" TEXT /* Test Case ID (TCD_ID) assigned to the test case */,
  "tcd_title" TEXT /* Title of the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the test case (e.g., passed, failed, in progress) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes related to the test case */,
  "bkc" TEXT /* Basic Configuration Kit (BKC) used for the test case */,
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product line associated with the test case */,
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test type associated with the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test case was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the test case */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the test case */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the test case */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of the test case in minutes */,
  "actual_duration" INTEGER /* Actual duration of the test case in minutes */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test case was executed */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Specific data or parameters used for the test case */,
  "test_script" TEXT /* Scripts or automation tools used for the test case */,
  "last_tested_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the test case was executed */,
  "next_test_scheduled_at" TEXT /* Next scheduled date and time for the test case */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_test_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_type_id") REFERENCES test_types ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_product_line_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_line_id") REFERENCES product_lines ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_lines" (
  "product_line_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product line */,
  "product_line_name" TEXT /* Name of the product line */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product line */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product line was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product line was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product line is active */,
  "product_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the product line */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_line_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_lines_product_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_types" (
  "test_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test type */,
  "test_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the test type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the test type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the test type was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the test type is active */,
  "test_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the test type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_types_test_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., tester, manager, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* List of permissions or roles associated with the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the result */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the test result (e.g., passed, failed, in progress) */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was executed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Detailed results or logs from the test execution */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result was last updated */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with the result */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test */,
  "retest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for retesting if the test failed */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a retest is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test configuration */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the configuration */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the test configuration */,
  "config_details" TEXT /* Detailed configuration settings used for the test case */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the configuration was last updated */,
  "config_version" TEXT /* Version of the configuration */,
  "config_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user responsible for the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_config_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_configurations_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the comment */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the comment was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the comment */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the comment */,
  "parent_comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent comment (for nested comments) */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_parent_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_comment_id") REFERENCES test_comments ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_comments_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_runs" (
  "run_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test run */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the run */,
  "run_number" INTEGER /* Run number for the test case */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the test run */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the test run */,
  "run_status" TEXT /* Status of the test run (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the run was last updated */,
  "tester_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the test run */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test run was executed */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Specific data or parameters used for the test run */,
  "test_script" TEXT /* Scripts or automation tools used for the test run */,
  "retest_reason" TEXT /* Reason for retesting if the test run failed */,
  "retest_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if a retest is required */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_runs_tester_id FOREIGN KEY ("tester_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_attachments" (
  "attachment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attachment */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test case associated with the attachment */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the attachment */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the attachment in MB */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., log, screenshot) */,
  "uploaded_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the attachment was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who uploaded the attachment */,
  "test_run_id" INTEGER /* ID of the test run associated with the attachment */,
  "attachment_type" TEXT /* Type of the attachment (e.g., log, screenshot, video) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attachment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_attachments_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_attachments_test_run_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_run_id") REFERENCES test_runs ("run_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_attachments_uploaded_by FOREIGN KEY ("uploaded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
